title: Make artifact transfer redaction total and self-contained
goal: Make artifact push and pull error handling total, bounded and redacted even when the operator module does not expose a private redaction helper, while preserving create-only destination and exact SHA-256 verification contracts.

approval.note: Repair response shaping and redaction only. Do not weaken host registration, create-only writes or source/destination digest verification.

acceptance.assertion: Artifact transfer uses a public shared redaction function or an injected callable with a defined fallback; no path dereferences an optional private operator attribute.
Local validation, SSH/SCP failure, destination collision, source drift and destination hash mismatch each return a bounded redacted error without NameError, AttributeError or leaking command output.
Successful push and pull still require registered hosts, create-only destination semantics, expected source SHA-256 and independently verified destination SHA-256.
Tests cover an operator with and without redaction helpers, secret-bearing stderr, missing SSH host, transfer failure, collision, hash mismatch and successful exact transfer.
A deployed transfer to a registered SSH host succeeds with matching source and destination hashes, while an induced failure returns only bounded redacted diagnostics.

live_reproduction.context: A create-only SHA-bound push from heim-pc to heimserver failed inside response redaction before a trustworthy transfer receipt could be produced.

does_not_establish: that SSH connectivity was otherwise healthy
permission to treat an unverified copy as delivered
metadata.verification_note: PR #311 introduced total self-contained artifact redaction. Live verification then found and fixed two deeper boundary defects: PR #328 removed an empty create-only remote argv element, and PR #330 condensed remote Python tracebacks to the controlled final diagnostic. The final reviewed merge was deployed and passed exact push, remote stat, pull, local stat and induced-collision proof against heimberry.

validation.ci: validate 3.10/3.12 and CodeQL passed on both final reviewed heads

live_artifact_proof.induced_failure: Remote artifact operation failed: destination already exists

validated_acceptance.explicit-redactor: PASS: Artifact errors use the self-contained bounded redactor with an optional injected callable and a generic fallback; no optional private operator attribute is dereferenced.
validated_acceptance.total-errors: PASS: Local validation, SSH/SCP failures, source drift, collisions and hash mismatches are bounded and secret-redacted. The final live collision exposes only destination already exists, without traceback or command output.
validated_acceptance.integrity-unchanged: PASS: The deployed path still requires a registered SSH host, create-only or exact replacement preconditions, expected source SHA-256 and independent destination SHA-256 verification.
validated_acceptance.tests: PASS: The final repository passed 18 focused artifact tests and 2,425 full tests with two expected skips, including missing helpers, secret-bearing output, missing host, transfer failures, collision, mismatch, exact publish and traceback condensation.
validated_acceptance.live-proof: PASS: Exact merge fbecef8e was deployed. A 55-byte artifact pushed to heimberry and pulled back with identical SHA-256 32c7801b..., while a repeated create-only push returned only the bounded redacted collision diagnostic.
